tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: You Dont Know How It Feels

content:
Great song by Tom Petty, I was disappointed with the version that is posted, despite having 5 stars 
and some good comments I thought it was incomplete, messy, over complicated and a little inaccurate,
so I thought I'd post my version, it's easier to follow (I think) and is complete.
This is an easy song to play along to and great for a beginner.
Please feel free to rate, comment, criticise etc.

[Intro]
[ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  x4

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
We got somethin', we both know it, we don't talk too much about it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Ain't no real big secret, all the same, somehow we get around it,  listen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]B[/ch]
It don't really matter to me baby, you believe what you want to believe, you see[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Somewhere, somehow, somebody must have kicked you around some[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Tell me why you want to lay there, revel in your abandon,    honey[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]B[/ch]
It don't make no difference to me baby, everybodys had to fight to be free, you see[/tab]

[Chorus] (twice)
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee oh no[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee[/tab]

[Middle Section]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Baby we ain't the first, I'm sure a lot of other lovers been burned[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]E[/ch] 
Right now it seems real to you, but it's one of those things you gotta feel to be true[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  x4

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Somewhere, somehow, somebody must have kicked you around some[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Who knows maybe you were kidnapped, tied up,  taken away and held for ransom,    honey[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]B[/ch]
It don't really matter to me baby, everybodys had to fight to be free, you see[/tab]

[Chorus] (3 times)
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee no[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee no[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
You don't have to live like a refugee, don't have to live like a refugee[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
(x5 to fade)[/tab]
